figures.caption: Table 6: Generalization results on four open-domain medical QA datasets.

Table 3: Overall results on the MedChain benchmark. We compare ClinicalAgents with single-LLM, single-agent, and multiagent baselines across five tasks representing workflow stages, and report scores for each task and the average score (higher is better). The symbol ‘—’ indicates that the model is a text-only LLM and not applicable to visiual examination task.

Figure 1: Overview of the ClinicalAgents framework. A Clinical Orchestrator coordinates a pool of specialized agents and a dual-memory system (working memory and experience memory) to execute an iterative Perceive–Hypothesize–Verify–Update loop with evidence-triggered backtracking.
